title: spiranthes goninensis
intro: Spiranthes goninensis, commonly known as the Chinese ladies' tresses, is a species of orchid native to China and other parts of Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Spiranthes goninensis include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestion and relieve pain. In herbal preparations, Spiranthes goninensis is often used to make teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make decoctions and poultices.
